item.title: Heavy-Duty Towing in Real Situations
item.description: A look at demanding towing and recovery work across a variety of real roadside situations using heavy-duty equipment. What challenges come with complex recoveries?

media:content.media:title: Heavy-Duty Towing in Real Situations
media:content.media:description: A look at demanding towing and recovery work across a variety of real roadside situations using heavy-duty equipment. What challenges come with complex recoveries?

item.title: Vehicle Recovery After Pole Impact
item.description: A recovery operation addresses a vehicle that has impacted a roadside pole, focusing on safe extraction and cleanup. What steps are needed in situations like this?

media:content.media:title: Vehicle Recovery After Pole Impact
media:content.media:description: A recovery operation addresses a vehicle that has impacted a roadside pole, focusing on safe extraction and cleanup. What steps are needed in situations like this?

item.title: Keeping a Heavy Truck Moving
item.description: A heavy-duty truck is stabilized and transported after mechanical failure, showing how recovery teams adapt in difficult conditions. What’s most important in a situation like this?

media:content.media:title: Keeping a Heavy Truck Moving
media:content.media:description: A heavy-duty truck is stabilized and transported after mechanical failure, showing how recovery teams adapt in difficult conditions. What’s most important in a situation like this?

item.title: Completing a Tough Recovery Job
item.description: A challenging recovery is brought to completion through teamwork, equipment use, and problem-solving under pressure. What makes a recovery successful?

media:content.media:title: Completing a Tough Recovery Job
media:content.media:description: A challenging recovery is brought to completion through teamwork, equipment use, and problem-solving under pressure. What makes a recovery successful?

item.title: Late-Night Recovery Operation
item.description: A recovery job carried out at night requires precision, lighting, and coordination to safely manage a difficult roadside situation. Why do night recoveries add complexity?

media:content.media:title: Late-Night Recovery Operation
media:content.media:description: A recovery job carried out at night requires precision, lighting, and coordination to safely manage a difficult roadside situation. Why do night recoveries add complexity?

item.title: Snow Safety Reminder
item.description: A safety-focused moment highlights the risks of winter driving and recovery work in snow. What are the key safety rules in winter conditions?

media:content.media:title: Snow Safety Reminder
media:content.media:description: A safety-focused moment highlights the risks of winter driving and recovery work in snow. What are the key safety rules in winter conditions?

item.title: A Highway Closure in Focus
item.description: A highway closure creates a complex recovery environment requiring coordination and safety control. What challenges come with shutting down a busy road?

media:content.media:title: A Highway Closure in Focus
media:content.media:description: A highway closure creates a complex recovery environment requiring coordination and safety control. What challenges come with shutting down a busy road?

item.title: Unloading a 20-Foot Container
item.description: A step-by-step look at unloading a large container using proper equipment and positioning. Careful planning ensures safety and efficiency. What’s the most important step?

media:content.media:title: Unloading a 20-Foot Container
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step look at unloading a large container using proper equipment and positioning. Careful planning ensures safety and efficiency. What’s the most important step?
